name: Media Integrity Registry
description: A curated, citable database of audiovisual media with provenance tracking, AI-generation detection metadata, and Digital Object Identifiers.

entries.title: My Favorite Twilight Knockoff
entries.description: A longform video essay by Jenny Nicholson examining a notable work of fiction that closely mirrors the plot, structure, and themes of Stephenie Meyer's Twilight saga.

aiDisclosure.notes: Traditionally produced longform video essay. No evidence of AI-generated content.

citation.apa: Nicholson, J. [Jenny Nicholson]. (2026, March 21). My favorite Twilight knockoff [Video]. YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PENDING_VIDEO_ID
citation.mla: Nicholson, Jenny. "My Favorite Twilight Knockoff." YouTube, uploaded by Jenny Nicholson, 21 Mar. 2026, www.youtube.com/watch?v=PENDING_VIDEO_ID.
